mapper.insert: INSERT INTO atch_file_info ( CO_ID, REF_SE_CD, REF_ID, FILE_SE_CD, ORGNL_FILE_NM, ENCPT_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_SZ, FILE_EXTN_NM, SORT_SEQ, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{refSeCd}, #{refId}, #{fileSeCd}, #{orgnlFileNm}, #{encptFileNm}, #{filePathNm}, #{fileSz}, #{fileExtnNm}, #{sortSeq}, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ATCH_FILE_SN, CO_ID, REF_SE_CD, REF_ID, FILE_SE_CD, ORGNL_FILE_NM, ENCPT_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_SZ, FILE_EXTN_NM, SORT_SEQ, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS REG_DT FROM atch_file_info WHERE ATCH_FILE_SN = #{atchFileSn} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE atch_file_info SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND REF_SE_CD = 'USER' AND REF_ID = #{refId} AND FILE_SE_CD = 'PROFILE' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
